price: Gewiß, sie sind mir (alle) Feinde, außer dem Herrn der Weltenbewohner,
arabic: فَإِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوّٞ لِّيٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: fa-innahum ʿaduwwun lī illā rabba al-ʿālamīna
